images.prompt:
Create a clean, minimal magazine-style thumbnail image at 1280x670 pixel aspect ratio (note.com thumbnail, 1.91:1 widescreen).

BACKGROUND: Warm off-white paper texture, color #EDEAE3, with very subtle natural paper grain. The entire canvas is filled with this background—no white margins.

TOP-LEFT (about 8% from top, 8% from left): Small lowercase text 'novasell' in light gray #9A9A9A, set in a refined, letter-spaced sans-serif (similar to Avenir Next Light). Below this text, a thin horizontal accent line in muted green #2A8762, about 35% of canvas width.

CENTER (vertically and horizontally centered, occupying middle 50% of canvas): Very large lowercase text 'bizdev note' in an ultra-light, heavily letter-spaced sans-serif typeface (similar to Avenir Next Ultra Light or Cormorant Light). Color: dark charcoal #2B2B2B. The letters should feel airy, modern, refined. Letter-spacing should be wide—like editorial magazine title design.

BOTTOM-LEFT (about 10% from bottom, 8% from left): On the upper line, '#6' in slightly bolder weight, dark charcoal #2B2B2B, font size larger than the subtitle below. On the line below '#6', the Japanese subtitle text 'AI時代の認知負荷を再設計する ― HITLの5軸/4原則' set in a clean Japanese gothic font (Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN or Yu Gothic), regular weight, dark charcoal #2B2B2B, single line.

BOTTOM-RIGHT (about 20% of canvas in the bottom-right corner): A subtle abstract topographic / contour-line pattern—nested concentric rounded organic shapes resembling a topographic map, drawn in very pale gray #D4D2CC thin lines. Decorative only, partially extending off the canvas edge. No labels.

OVERALL STYLE: Japanese editorial magazine aesthetic, minimal, refined, calm, professional. No icons, no photos, no illustrations of people, no other graphic elements beyond what is described. The composition should feel intentional and balanced—lots of negative space.
